Alternative geometry.description: Supplementary analyses of UGA and channel-KME geometry variants.

COSMIC/NNLS exposure checks.description: Supplementary checks using COSMIC reference signature exposure features.

Mechanistic controls.description: Supplementary mechanistic or diagnostic control analyses.

no UGA atlas.description: Representation does not use the UGA channel atlas.

not applicable.description: Atlas status is not applicable for this analysis.

uses COSMIC reference signatures; no UGA.description: COSMIC reference signatures are used for exposure estimation; no UGA atlas is used.

uses GRCh37 FASTA windows; no UGA atlas.description: Sequence context is fetched from GRCh37 FASTA windows; no UGA atlas is used.

uses UGA channel atlas for SBS/DBS; ID p.description: SBS/DBS channels use the UGA channel atlas and ID channels use the ID payload encoder.

binary_positive_probability.description: Binary reliability plot using the predicted probability of the positive class.

multiclass_confidence_accuracy.description: Multiclass reliability plot using maximum predicted confidence versus correctness.

maf_stack_vs_signatures.description: Event-level MAF stack compared with mutational signatures.

one_hot_kme_vs_signatures.description: One-hot sequence KME compared with mutational signatures.

sig_maf_vs_maf_stack.description: Signatures plus MAF stack compared with MAF stack alone.

sig_maf_vs_signatures.description: Signatures plus MAF stack compared with mutational signatures alone.

signatures_vs_burden.description: Mutational signatures compared with mutational burden.

HRD_LOH.description: Loss-of-heterozygosity component of homologous recombination deficiency.

HRD_LST.description: Large-scale transition component of homologous recombination deficiency.

HRD_TAI.description: Telomeric allelic imbalance component of homologous recombination deficiency.

Original data.description: Original Kucab benchmark without low-burden downsampling.

cancer_type_top10.description: Classification among the ten most frequent TCGA cancer types.

damage_class.description: Kucab DNA damage class from mutagen-treated clone catalogues.

mmr_gene_mutated.description: Indicator for mutation in mismatch repair genes.

pole_pold1_mutated.description: Indicator for POLE or POLD1 mutation.

main.description: Endpoint belongs to the main manuscript panel.

supplement.description: Endpoint belongs to the supplementary panel.

auroc.description: Area under the receiver operating characteristic curve.

score.description: Primary score reported by the source analysis.

XGBoost.description: Gradient-boosted tree model implemented with XGBoost.

elastic_net.description: Elastic-net regularized linear or generalized linear model.

unspecified.description: Model family was not specified by the source analysis.
